title: lippia hirsuta var. sphacelifolia
intro: Lippia hirsuta var. sphacelifolia, commonly known as the wild basil or Mexican oregano, is a fragrant, aromatic plant belonging to the Verbenaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lippia hirsuta var. sphacelifolia include reducing fever, relieving respiratory problems, and aiding in digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
